title: Agent Feedback Artifact
description: Optional review artifact shape for comparing agent-feedback evaluations; not a required operating surface unless a later command emits it valid-by-construction.

kind.description: Discriminator identifying the payload or record shape.

evaluated_at.description: Timestamp or date when this artifact was evaluated.

prompt_ref.description: Prompt, task, or request reference that produced the feedback.

target.description: Destination file, surface, package, or record referenced by this entry.

work_window.description: Timebox or work interval covered by this record.

items.description: One entry in the package surfaces used list.

package_surfaces_used.description: Package-owned surfaces used during the work window.

notes.description: Additional notes that qualify this record.

context.description: Execution context in which the feedback or record was captured.

outcome.description: Observed or intended outcome for this entry.

quality.description: Quality signal captured for this feedback item.

efficiency.description: Efficiency or effort signal captured for this feedback item.

cognitive_load.description: Cognitive-load signal captured for this feedback item.

impact.description: Observed impact of the work or feedback.

id.description: Stable identifier used to reference this record.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary for this entry.

classification.description: Classification used for routing, filtering, or policy selection.

items.description: One entry in the evidence list.

evidence.description: Evidence supporting this finding, policy, or assertion.

severity.description: Severity level used to prioritize response.

items.description: One entry in the findings list.

finding_id.description: Finding id text value used by this contract.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary for this entry.

expected_effect.description: Expected effect text value used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the suggestions list.

suggestions.description: Ordered suggestions entries used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the issues list.

issues.description: Ordered issues entries used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the deferred list.

deferred.description: Ordered deferred entries used by this contract.

follow_up_routing.description: Follow up routing details used by this contract.
